meta.data_policy: SYNTHETIC ONLY — no production PII. Names/phones/policy_no/cardNo are fabricated. Policy-type codes use spec enum (ORD/IND/GOV/PA). Status/remark/registration codes per spec.
meta.readiness_reason: All P0/P1 TCs have datasets. Score capped <100 because layout-dependent datasets (CSV columns, per-policy log field order) are BLOCKED by RQ-003, policy-type code char by RQ-001, linkage field by RQ-009 — those fields carry placeholder + rq flag, not invented values.

datasets.description: Send rule (a): not registered on either channel.
datasets.expected_result: SEND SMS; row sent_status='S'.

datasets.description: Send rule (b): LINE registered but blocked, no App.
datasets.expected_result: SEND SMS; sent_status='S'.

datasets.description: Exclude variants: App registered OR LINE registered not-blocked.
datasets.expected_result: EXCLUDE — no SMS.

datasets.description: E13/error on one or both channels → skip + 'F'.
datasets.expected_result: skip immediately, no retry, sent_status='F', run continues.

datasets.description: LINE E13 + App registered — precedence ambiguous.
datasets.expected_result: [BLOCKED — RQ-006/precedence] no send certain; recorded status (Exclude vs 'F') pending SA. Do NOT invent.

datasets.description: Day-count BVA around N=20.
datasets.expected_result: N=20 selected; 19 and 21 not selected in this daily round.

datasets.description: Inforce by policy type. NOTE: policy_type code CHARACTER is RQ-001 (assume letters O/I/G/P).
datasets.expected_result: ORD/PA in-force iff status='1'; IND/GOV in-force iff status in {1,2,3}; else excluded.
datasets.rq_flag: RQ-001 — confirm actual code char before freezing expected.

datasets.description: Do Not Contact by type.
datasets.expected_result: ORD remark '1' excluded; IND/GOV/PA remark '4' excluded.

datasets.description: Phone selection mobile1>mobile2; both-empty excluded; current-phone source.
datasets.expected_result: mobile1 used if present; else mobile2; both empty → excluded; sent phone = policy master (not round-1).

datasets.description: cardNo not found for a policy that should have one.
datasets.expected_result: skip + sent_status='F', round continues.

datasets.description: Whole registration service down.
datasets.expected_result: retry <=3 spaced; still failing → stop round + email. Interval per RQ-008.

datasets.description: Dedup: prior success vs prior 'F'; lifetime cap.
datasets.expected_result: prior 'S' (sent_date not null) excluded; prior 'F' not counted as sent; lifetime <=1.

datasets.description: One customer, multiple policies in same round → 1 message, deterministic pick, non-selected logged.
datasets.expected_result: 1 message; representative = oldest contract_start, tie-break smallest policy_no; others logged.

data.name: ปรีชา
data.expected_representative: O2600000051 (oldest 2018-01-01; tie vs O2600000052 → smaller policy_no)

datasets.description: Message template + variable substitution + no-name skip.
datasets.expected_result: template '111' used (fallback if absent); var1/2/3 filled from Active config; no '${' leak; missing name → skip 'F'.

datasets.description: No Active campaign config on processing day.
datasets.expected_result: stop whole round + email.

datasets.description: CSV/ESB delivery. CSV column layout BLOCKED by RQ-003.
datasets.expected_result: UTF-8 file named MKT_CSMS_MKTWelcomeNewCustApp_[YYMMDDhhmmss].csv (YY Buddhist 2-digit); sent via ESB→Gateway.

datasets.description: SMS Gateway send failure.
datasets.expected_result: sent_status='F', sms_sent_date NULL (Manual-Fix eligible).

datasets.description: 2-level logging + refer_no + policy-type map. Field layout RQ-003, code char RQ-001.
datasets.expected_result: campaign log + per-policy log written; refer_no+status stored; type map O→ORD/I→IND/G→GOV/P→PA.

datasets.description: Round-1 linkage ID. Field name BLOCKED by RQ-009.
datasets.expected_result: round2 log row carries non-null ref matching an existing CSMS-001 round-1 record (100% traceable, SC-006).

datasets.description: sent_status state values.
datasets.expected_result: success→sent_date set+'S'; skip/fail→sent_date NULL+'F'; column exists.

datasets.description: Round-failure email. SLA minutes BLOCKED by RQ-004.
datasets.expected_result: email to IT Dev + Users with batch name + failed step; timing within 15 min (SC-005, RQ-004).

datasets.description: Manual Fix: reprocess NULL-sent-date only; never resend 'S'; daily no-retry-'F'; date-range = date−N; mid-flight N change.
datasets.expected_result: only sms_sent_date IS NULL sent; 'S' untouched; cohort = selected_date − current N; no duplicates on N change.

datasets.description: Central daily report breakdown. Requirement merged in FR-020.2 (RQ-002).
datasets.expected_result: report shows total, 'S', 'F', excluded-by-reason (DoNotContact/registered/dup-in-round/already-sent), breakdown ORD/IND/GOV/PA; no threshold alert.

data.rq_flag: RQ-002 — reporting has no own FR.

datasets.description: Assorted edges: schedule 10:00; empty round-1 day = normal end; late-App accept; config default & change.
datasets.expected_result: 10:00 auto-run; empty cohort → normal end (no failure email); late App reg accepted; N default 20 and change applies next round.

traceability_matrix.note: Every P0/P1 TC has >=1 dataset. TCs with BLOCKED oracles carry rq_flag rather than invented values.

data_gaps_and_risks: CSV column layout + per-policy log field order/field#7 (RQ-003) — cannot build exact-schema assertion data.
policy-type code character (RQ-001) — datasets assume letters O/I/G/P; must confirm.
round-1 linkage field name (RQ-009) — placeholder only.
failure SLA minutes (RQ-004) and retry interval (RQ-008) — timing datasets flagged.
credit_amount value source (RQ-007) — logged field left blocked.
All datasets are synthetic; real SIT run needs provisioned round-1 history, policy master, config, and reachable registration/ESB services (currently none).
